# Maya Ziv Law – Attorney & Notary in Tel Aviv

> A boutique law firm specializing in cross-border legal services for domestic and international clients in Israel and abroad.

## About

Maya Ziv Law provides premium legal counsel at the intersection of Israeli and international law. The firm serves domestic clients, foreign investors, new immigrants (Olim), and multinational businesses operating in or with Israel. Founded by Maya Ziv, Attorney & Notary, the practice combines deep Israeli legal expertise with fluency in cross-border matters.

## Practice Areas

- **Real Estate Law**: Purchase and sale transactions, due diligence, title verification, remote transactions for overseas buyers, urban renewal (TAMA 38/Pinui-Binui).
- **Taxation**: Israeli tax positioning, cross-border tax planning, FATCA/CRS compliance, capital gains, tax treaties (US-Israel, EU-Israel).
- **Estate Planning & Wills**: Drafting wills under Israeli law, inheritance orders, cross-border estate administration, probate, lasting powers of attorney.
- **Commercial & Civil Law**: Corporate structuring, commercial contracts, joint ventures, business licensing, partnership agreements.
- **Services for New Immigrants (Olim)**: Tax benefits guidance, property acquisition, bank account setup, legal orientation for relocation to Israel.
